headline: ORR: A Hedge Fund In ETF Clothing, Convincing Buy Opportunity
summary: Militia Long/Short Equity Fund has delivered 47.1% NAV return since January 2025, outperforming the S&P 500 by 2.5x. See why I rate ORR ETF a Buy.
